name: Sunset Ridge Golf Links
about: Sunset Ridge Golf Links is a facility in Westbrook, ME, featuring an 18-hole golf course, a 9-hole disc golf course, and indoor golf simulators. They offer memberships and hourly simulator play, with 5 Full Swing and Foresight GC Hawk simulators available. The venue provides event space and activities year-round, including a Bar & Grill, swimming pool in the summer, and various leagues and events. Simulators are available for practice on a driving range or for playing quick 9-hole games.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of simulator options with over 80 courses to choose from
Year-round play regardless of weather with indoor simulators
Opportunity to join leagues and events for a social experience
Multiple membership options for regular players

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food and drink are available for purchase at the on-site Bar & Grill. BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play a quick 9 holes in approximately 30 minutes. 18 holes would take about an hour.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers Youth Memberships and is family-friendly, with activities for all ages.
